summary: Iter 3 feature-pack test: medication reminders, daily routine, per-member check-in system, SOS w/ coords + history, /summary endpoint, lazy missed-checkin detection. Backend pytest 17/17 PASS against https://family-guard-37.preview.emergentagent.com. Frontend mobile (390x844): new dashboard layout verified live (Members/Checked in/Missed meds summary, 💊 X/Y taken chip on senior cards, per-member member-checkin-{id} pill, SOS button). Per-member check-in flow works end-to-end: tap → POST /checkins → /check-in screen shows James name → tap Done → back to dashboard with ✅ Checked in chip and 1/1 counter.

issues: RN-Web warnings persist (cosmetic): 'shadow*' deprecated → boxShadow, props.pointerEvents → style.pointerEvents. Carried from iter 1/2.

action_items: Optional: migrate shadow*/props.pointerEvents to silence RN-Web deprecations.

Optional: the floating sos-button on dashboard and the tab-bar 'Alerts' icon can both resolve a generic [data-testid=sos-button] query after route changes due to React Navigation keeping previous screens mounted; not user-visible, only a strict-mode test concern.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py /api/sos correctly stores latitude/longitude on the Alert doc and includes 'HH:MM UTC, Mon DD' timestamp + 4-decimal coords in message — verified in tests.
detect_missed_checkins is idempotent per day (start-of-day window + existing-alert guard) — verified by repeat GET /alerts not producing duplicates.
POST /checkins acknowledges today's missed_checkin alerts for that member — verified.
reset_daily_reminder_statuses uses last_marked_date != today_str() to flip back to pending — correct.
Signup seed: 3 meds + 4 routines + James.daily_checkin_time='09:00' verified live in tests.
Pydantic CheckinSettings accepts Optional[str] None to disable — verified.

success_rate.frontend: Core flows verified live: signup→dashboard→per-member check-in→confirm→return. Remaining UI surfaces (add-med, add-routine, mark-missed, SOS-to-alerts) confirmed at API layer; UI not re-walked end-to-end due to script timeout on duplicated sos-button locator, but testIDs are present in source.

seed_data_creation: Fresh signups featuretest+<uuid>@kinnectcare.app/password123 used (auto-seeds Gregory + James + 3 meds + 4 routines + 2 alerts). One TEST_FE_Med + TEST_FE_Routine created via UI; cleaned implicitly per-user.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Welcome screen CTA is 'Get Started' (NOT 'Sign up'). Demo seed = Gregory (family) + James (senior, daily_checkin_time=09:00). On mobile-web React Native, Alert.alert() converts to window.confirm — register page.on('dialog', lambda d: d.accept()) BEFORE clicking destructive buttons. After router.back() to dashboard, the previous member-detail's sos-button stays in DOM hidden — use .first or scope by visible=True. Per-member check-in DOES auto-acknowledge today's missed_checkin alerts in backend. Pydantic rejects .test TLD; use @kinnectcare.app.
rca_of_issue: N/A — all reported features pass. The transient 30s startup outage observed earlier was Metro re-bundling after supervisorctl restart expo (used to clear stale bundle from earlier iteration). After ~90s Metro is hot and responsive.
